pages.text: Each circle runs one function at a time, determined by a Function Sigil placed in the core.$(br2)Sigils are found in ancient ruins, earned from bosses, or crafted through rituals. Each sigil specifies a minimum tier and base mana upkeep.
To activate: open the core GUI, insert a sigil, place required catalysts in plinths, and click Activate.$(br2)To change function: deactivate, swap the sigil, and reactivate. No rebuilding required.
